case_title: SRV BAY CITI PROPERTIES VS. JACOB RODRIGUEZ et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SRV BAY CITI PROPERTIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JACOB THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED ON 12/22/03 $3,575.00 RENT, $1,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SRV BAY CITI PROPERTIES
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SRV BAY CITI PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JACOB DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JACOB
DECLARATION OF JEFFREY MARGULIES UPON A BREACH FILED BY PLAINTIFF SRV BAY CITI PROPERTIES
